pattern: Module-scope caches (landings.js, gsc.js, serpapi.js) are unbounded with no eviction logic
reason: Accepted as by-design in 2026-06-04 audit — CLI is short-lived; only dashboard --live holds the process alive with a small, bounded number of projects. GitHub issue #17 filed for awareness.

pattern: seoCheck thresholds in pr.js diverge from validate.js thresholds
reason: Intentionally separate concerns (PR-body display vs validation gate) per 2026-06-04 audit. GitHub issue #18 filed. Two audits without a fix attempt confirms acceptance.
